os: Windows 11 Pro 10.0.26200 + WSL2 (Ubuntu-24.04) Docker Desktop backend

gpus.name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Max-Q Workstation Edition

model_cache: docker named volume vllm-hfcache (D:-backed ext4; avoids 9P bind-mount tax)
notes: Production heavy tier (gpt-oss-120b, container vllm-gptoss120) was running at bakeoff start.
WSL2 device_ids isolation is ignored (repo gotcha #13); GPU pinning is done via CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES with CUDA_DEVICE_ORDER=PCI_BUS_ID.
